_meta.description: Persistent living knowledge for the FIMI & Cognitive Warfare Monitor. Carries forward active campaign tracking per actor, actor doctrine profiles, and platform enforcement tracker across weekly issues.

version_history.reason: Haaretz and Süddeutsche Zeitung March 2026 confirmed Black Cube operation

RU.doctrine_summary: Active Measures / Reflexive Control / Information Confrontation Doctrine. Information operations as integral to conflict below kinetic threshold (Gerasimov Doctrine 2013). Reflexive Control theory: shaping adversary decision-making through information manipulation.

CN.doctrine_summary: Discourse Power (话语权) / United Front Work / Three Warfares (心理战·舆论战·法律战). Three Warfares concept formalised 2003 PLA Political Work Regulations. Strategic patience: long-term narrative shaping over episodic operations.

IR.doctrine_summary: IRGC cognitive warfare / information operations. Elevated operational tempo since October 7 2023. Blurs distinction between genuine political expression and foreign-directed amplification — most methodologically difficult attribution category.

GULF.doctrine_summary: Strategic narrative management / lobbying-to-influence. UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar operating with distinct doctrines. UAE: targeted intelligence operations (Project Raven, NSO-client). Saudi: narrative seeding and anti-rival campaigns. Qatar: Al Jazeera soft power and parliamentary lobbying.
primary_infrastructure: Qatar: Al Jazeera, European parliamentary channels

US.doctrine_summary: Near-state political influence operations / PAC-adjacent activity. Methodological note: this monitor applies the same inclusion criteria to US operations as to other actors — cross-border reach using covert means, foreign funding, or coordinated platform manipulation. Domestic political communication without foreign dimension is outside scope.
primary_infrastructure: Big Tech regulatory capture of DSA process

IL.doctrine_summary: Hasbara / Perception Management / Commercial Cognitive Warfare. Distinctive feature: privatisation of capability through Black Cube, NSO Group, Psy-Group (legacy). State-level capability with full deniability through commercial operators. ELNET parliamentary lobbying infrastructure in Europe.

platform_enforcement_tracker.headline: Doppelganger network — largest Russia-attributed removal since 2022
EEAS: 88% of flagged FIMI content remains on X — structural enforcement failure
